creator: ian@FreeBSD.org
text:
(In reply to Edmondas Girkantas from comment #2)

It doesn't appear that the author is maintaining any kind of tags or release/versioning system for the code on github, so I'm not sure how practical it is for the port to try to use that code.

The readme at github says v2.3.10, while the googlecode archive is 2.3.11.  The archive on googlecode was uploaded in 2013.  On github there have been several commits since 2013, but I see nothing about a version-numbered release of those changes.

So all in all, as a relatively ignorant user of the code who's not very good at ports stuff, I guess I'll defer to the port's maintainer to do an updated version, if that's appropriate.  I would like to see the version people have been using for years become available again in the meantime.  (The source tarball from googlecode matches the distinfo for the tarball we've historically used that came from the unixpapa site.)
